---
title: "solutions"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
outcomes <- read.csv("data/outcome-of-care-measures.csv")
outcomes$ha <- as.numeric(outcomes[[11]])
hospitals <- read.csv("data/hospital-data.csv")
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
temp <- hospitals %>% left_join(outcomes, by=join_by(Provider.Number))
sum(is.na(temp$Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack))
dim(temp)
```

```{r}
data <- outcomes %>% inner_join(hospitals, by=join_by(Provider.Number))
dim(data)
```

```{r}
sum(is.na(outcomes$ha))
```

```{r}
data <- data %>% 
  mutate(Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack = as.numeric(Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack))
```

```{r}
data %>% 
  filter(State.x == "TX") %>%
  select(Hospital.Name.x, Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack) %>% 
  drop_na() %>% 
  arrange(Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack) %>% 
  head(1)

```

```{r}
data %>% 
  group_by(State.x) %>%
  summarise(hospital_count = n_distinct(Hospital.Name.y)) %>%
  arrange(desc(hospital_count))
```

```{r}
mean(x = data$Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}
data %>% 
  select(Hospital.Name.x, State.x, Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack) %>% 
  drop_na() %>% 
  arrange(desc(Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack))
```

```{r}
data %>% 
  filter(State.x == "TX") %>%
  select(Hospital.Name.x, State.x, Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack) %>% 
  drop_na() %>% 
  arrange(Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack)
```

```{r}
data %>%
  select(State.x, Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  filter(State.x == "TX", Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack <= 14) %>% count()
  
```
